earl-grey-tiramisu.name: Earl Grey Tiramisu

ingredients.item: Grand marnier or other orange liqueur
. vanilla bean paste or vanilla extract
Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Bring 1½ cups water to a boil in a medium saucepan. Remove from heat and immediately add 10 Earl Grey tea bags and 2 Tbsp. sugar. Let sit, stirring occasionally, 10 minutes.

Remove tea bags, wringing them out over pan; discard tea bags. Pour tea into a shallow bowl and stir in ⅓ cup Grand Marnier or other orange liqueur and a pinch of kosher salt. Let cool.
Do Ahead: Soak can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

Pour water into a clean medium saucepan to come 2" up sides and bring to a simmer. Combine 3 large egg yolks and 2 Tbsp. water in a medium heatproof bowl. Cut open 3 Earl Grey tea bags and empty into a spice mill or blender. Add ¹⁄₃ cup sugar and pulse until tea is very finely ground; add to bowl with egg yolks. Set bowl over saucepan (do not let it touch water) and reduce heat to low. Using an electric mixer (or a large whisk), beat mixture on medium-high speed until eggs are tripled in volume and pale yellow in color, about 5 minutes. Remove bowl from heat; let cool.

Using clean beaters, beat 1½ cups chilled heavy cream and ¾ cup mascarpone in a separate medium bowl on medium-high speed until medium peaks form. Add 1 tsp. vanilla bean paste or vanilla extract and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt and beat 1 minute. Add egg yolk mixture and gently fold with a rubber spatula just until no streaks remain.

Working one at a time, dip 10 crisp ladyfingers into soak, leaving just until slightly softened, 1–2 seconds per side. Arrange ladyfingers in an even layer in an 8x8" baking dish. Using an offset spatula, spread half of filling evenly over. Working one at a time, soak remaining 10 crisp ladyfingers and layer in baking dish over filling. Spread remaining filling over, creating swooshes and swirls as desired. Cover baking dish with plastic wrap and chill tea-ramisu at least 4 hours.

Just before serving, uncover tea-ramisu and lightly dust with unsweetened cocoa powder.
Do Ahead: Tea-ramisu (without cocoa powder) can be made 1 day ahead. Keep chilled.

easter-bunny-sweet-bread-for-children-pe.name: Easter Bunny Sweet Bread For Children
easter-bunny-sweet-bread-for-children-pe.original_name: Pan dulce de Conejitos de Pascua para niños

ingredients.item: 500 g de harina de trigo de fuerza (tipo 550) o harina de trigo normal (tipo 405)
1 sobre de levadura seca (12 g) o medio cubo de levadura fresca (25 g)
1 yema de huevo mezclada con 1 cucharada de leche

instructions: Para la masa de levadura, derretimos la mantequilla en el microondas a baja potencia y templamos ligeramente la leche.

Then we mix the flour with the dry yeast into a big bowl. We add the other ingredients: sugar, a pint of salt, egg, melted butter and temperate milk. We amassed everything well by hand till we formed a ball. If the dough stick too much to our hands, we add some more flour.

We cover the bowl with the dough and let them stand at a warm place for at least 30-40 minutes (or more time if we can), for example inside the oven at 50 ″ 3 ″. Meanwhile, we prepared an oven plate with baking paper for later.
When the mass has been Visibly increased, we put it to an enlarged surface, amassed it slightly again and divided into eight portions of the same size.
Formamos con cada una de las ocho porciones un rulo de unos 30 cm de largo.
From each ruble we cut a little bit the size of a nut and form it into a little ball, that will be the rabbit's tail.

Then we double each rulo as "U" and clamp the ends with each other. We leave a small hole at the central bottom to place the ball that makes up the rabbit's tail. We put the little rabbits already formed into the oven plate and leave them with space and let them rest for another 15 minutes.
Finally, we pinch the rabbits with the mixture of yema and milk (1 yema with 1 tablespoon of milk) and we sprinkle with lost sugar.
We put the decorated rabbits into the pressurized oven and baked them for 15-20 minutes at 180-3-o (heat up and down), until they are slightly golden.

easter-lemon-bread.name: Easter Lemon Bread
instructions: Preheat oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Grease and flour 2 loaf pans.
Combine the flour, baking powder, and salt and set aside.

Beat the butter and 2 1/2 cups sugar with an electric mixer in a large bowl until light and fluffy. The mixture should be noticeably lighter in color. Add the room-temperature eggs one at a time, allowing each egg to blend into the butter mixture before adding the next. Beat in the almond extract with the last egg.

Pour in the flour mixture alternately with the milk, mixing until just incorporated. Fold in the lemon zest and chopped walnuts, mixing just enough to evenly combine. Pour the batter into the prepared pans.
Bake in the preheated oven until the loaves are very lightly browned and a toothpick inserted into the middle comes out clean, 60 to 70 minutes.

Mix the lemon juice with the 1/2 cup sugar in a bowl until the sugar has dissolved. Pour the lemon glaze over the hot cakes; allow to stand for 10 minutes before removing cakes from the pans. Cool before serving.

egg-and-chorizo-burritos.name: Egg And Chorizo Burritos
instructions: Cook chorizo in a medium heavy skillet over medium-low heat, stirring occasionally, until chorizo is brown and fat is rendered, about 20 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer chorizo to a medium bowl. Drain all but 1 Tbsp. drippings from pan; set pan aside.

Preheat broiler. Divide tortillas between 2 baking sheets; sprinkle half of cheese over, dividing equally; set aside. Heat drippings in reserved skillet over medium-low heat; add eggs and cook, stirring occasionally, until eggs are just set, about 4 minutes.
Cook tortillas until warmed through and cheese begins to melt, about 20 seconds.

Working quickly, top tortillas with chorizo and eggs, dividing evenly. Sprinkle with remaining half of cheese and cilantro. Working one at a time, fold in top and bottom ends of tortillas, then roll up, starting from an unfolded side, into burritos.

egg-free-and-milk-free-baked-oatmeal.name: Egg-free And Milk-free Baked Oatmeal
instructions: Lightly grease a pie pan.
Beat applesauce and white sugar together in a bowl. Add oats, soy milk, 1 tablespoon plus 1/4 teaspoon baking powder, vegetable oil, and sea salt; mix well. Fold raisins into oat mixture.
Pour oat mixture into the prepared pie pan; top with brown sugar and cinnamon. Refrigerate for 8 hours to overnight.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Bake in the preheated oven until oatmeal is firm, 35 to 50 minutes.

eggs-with-tomato-argiro.name: Eggs With Tomato

ingredients.item: 1 small onion cut into thin slides
1/2 red and 1/2 green pepper finely chopped in frame
5 ripe large and tight tomatoes chopped or 11⁄2 pack where peeled tomatoes
2 very small fresh onions (their leaves only finely chopped)
1 small onion cut into thin slides
1/2 red and 1/2 green pepper finely chopped in frame
5 ripe large and tight tomatoes chopped or 11⁄2 pack where peeled tomatoes
2 very small fresh onions (their leaves only finely chopped)

instructions: Heat the oil in a large pan.
Sauté the dried onion for 3 minutes, add the peppers and continue the sauce for 3 minutes.
Then add the tomato and paste and simmer for 8-10 minutes.
Add the salt and pepper and add the paprika and sugar.
Optionally add cayenne pepper or a little buffalo.
If we want at this point, add a few slides.
Break the eggs one by one in a bowl.
Then pour them into the pan.
Allow the eggs to simmer in the wonderful sauce for a few minutes.
Depending on when you prefer the egg yolk, you prolong or reduce cooking time.
Finally sprinkle with the chopped tanter leaves (green) of fresh onions.
Serve with bread and feta cheese for complete enjoyment!

english-walnut-pie.name: English Walnut Pie
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (205 degrees C).
Whisk eggs in a large bowl. Mix in sugar, corn syrup, vanilla, and salt. Whisk in melted butter, then stir in walnuts. Pour filling into deep-dish pie crust.
Bake in the preheated oven for 10 minutes. Reduce the heat to 149°C (150 degrees C) and continue baking until set in the center, 35 to 45 minutes.
Cool completely on a wire rack before slicing; the pie will firm up as it cools.

enjoy-this-green-chicken-curry-comedera.name: Enjoy That Green Chicken Curry
enjoy-this-green-chicken-curry-comedera.original_name: Disfruta de este curry verde de pollo
instructions: It starts the recipe and heat a frying pan with olive oil.
Later, add ion and garlic. Meg and let cook for 2 minutes till transparent.
Then add ginger, cinnamon, green curry with pasta, salt and pepper to suit. Meg and cook with medium heat for a minute.
It proceeds and incorporates chicken breast into cubes, mix and cook for 5 minutes till golden.
After that time, pour coconut milk and lime juice. Meg and cook over medium heat for 7 minutes till breast softens and forms a dense salsa.
After that time, put out and let them rest and serve with your favorite garrison.
Enjoy!

enjoy-this-ripe-banana-in-an-airfryer-co.name: Enjoy This Ripe Banana In An Airfryer
enjoy-this-ripe-banana-in-an-airfryer-co.original_name: Disfruta este plátano maduro en airfryer
instructions: It purifies air frying at 180 been 3 been.
Peel the bananas and remove any damaged parts. Cut his tipples.
Haz un corta en el centro a lo largo, tipo canoa. Esparce un poco de sal al gusto.
Corta el queso mozzarella en bastones o ralla.
Put the cheese at the centre of the banana and scuba with some olive oil.
Hornea at the air frying range from 10 to 13 minutes to 180 and 3 minutes or until soft and creamy cheese.
Retract from the airfryer and taste as a garrison or alone.
Enjoy!

espresso-martini-no-bake-cheesecake.name: Espresso Martini No-bake Cheesecake
instructions: For the cookie crust, add the chocolate cookies and melted butter to a food processor. Pulse for 30 seconds, or until the mixture reaches a sandy consistency. Set aside.
In a heat-safe bowl, dissolve the gelatin powder in boiling water. Mix until fully dissolved, ensuring there are no clumps.
For the filling, add the cream cheese, cream, sugar, coffee liqueur, instant coffee, melted chocolate, and gelatin mixture to a blender. Blend for 60 seconds, or until smooth.
Divide the cookie crust among 4 martini glasses. Press the crust against the sides of each glass with a spoon.
Pour the cheesecake filling into each glass and refrigerate for 3-4 hours, or until the cheesecake is set.
Decorate the cheesecakes with dark chocolate shavings and coffee beans.
Enjoy!

eton-mess-recipe-lezzet.name: Eton Mess Recipe
instructions: 1. Wash and clean the stems.
2. Light weight with powder sugar; Crush it and wait on a edge.
3. &ccedil until the cream is solidified with sugar.
4. Add the service bowls to fretasks, fregated cream and beze pieces in layer.
5. All materials are light-and-flavored; mixi extra beze veçndens&periodl;s&service.
6.  Afiyet olsun.

ever-banana-bread.name: Ever Banana Bread
instructions: Mix eggs, bananas, oil, and buttermilk together in a large bowl until well combined.
Sift flour, sugar, baking soda, and salt into a separate large bowl.
Stir flour mixture into the banana mixture until combined. Gently fold in pecans.
Pour batter into the prepared loaf pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean, 1 hour and 20 minutes.
Cut into slices and enjoy!

everyones-spinach-salad-with-poppy-seed-.name: Everyone's Spinach Salad With Poppy Seed Dressing
instructions: Whisk vinegar, oil, sugar, poppy seeds, onion, Worcestershire sauce, and paprika together in a bowl until sugar is completely dissolved.
Layer spinach, strawberries, blue cheese, and pecans in individual bowls. Drizzle dressing generously over each salad.
